## 這個 PR 做了什麼 / What does this PR do

<!-- 一兩句話說清楚 / One or two sentences -->

## 為什麼 / Why

<!-- 動機、關聯 issue(如 Closes #123)/ Motivation, linked issues -->

## 怎麼驗證 / How was it verified

- [ ] `npm test` 通過 / passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` 通過 / passes
- [ ] 手動測試過受影響的流程 / manually exercised the affected flow

<!-- 附上截圖或輸出證據更好 / Screenshots or output evidence appreciated -->

## 檢查清單 / Checklist

- [ ] 變更盡量小、聚焦單一目的 / Change is small and focused
- [ ] 沒有夾帶金鑰或個人資料 / No keys or personal data included
- [ ] UI 文案維持繁體中文(i18n 抽層前)/ UI copy stays Traditional Chinese (until the i18n layer lands)
